summary: Iteration 80 - Cooperative Subscription System Testing Complete. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Pricing section with 3 plans (Starter 50K, Pro 120K, Enterprise 250K FCFA), 6-month trial banner, billing toggle with -17% badge, REDD+ value proposition with 4 cards, CTA section with updated text, FAQ page with REDD+ and pricing categories.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/coop-subscriptions/plans returns 3 plans with correct pricing (50000, 120000, 250000 FCFA/month)
PASS: Plans API returns trial info with 6 months duration (180 days) and Pro access level
PASS: GET /api/coop-subscriptions/my-subscription returns 403 for non-cooperative users (admin tested)
PASS: POST /api/coop-subscriptions/choose-plan validates plan parameter (returns 400 for invalid/trial plans)
PASS: Homepage pricing section displays 3 cooperative plan cards with data-testid attributes
PASS: Pricing section shows '6 mois d'essai gratuit offerts' trial banner
PASS: Pricing section has billing toggle (Mensuel/Annuel) with -17% badge
PASS: Yearly pricing toggle works correctly (shows ~41,667 FCFA/month for Starter)
PASS: REDD+ value proposition section visible with 4 cards (Credits Carbone, Conformite EUDR, MRV National, Paiements Resultats)
PASS: CTA section shows updated text about 6 months free trial and REDD+/ARS 1000/SSRTE
PASS: FAQ page has REDD+ category with 4 questions (Strategie Nationale REDD+, MRV, EUDR, GreenLink aide)
PASS: FAQ page has Abonnements category with pricing questions about cooperative subscriptions
PASS: Pro plan is marked as recommended in both API and UI
PASS: Plan features correctly differentiated (Starter limited, Pro full, Enterprise all features)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 80 verified cooperative subscription system: (1) Backend API at /api/coop-subscriptions/plans returns 3 plans with correct pricing and 6-month trial info. (2) /my-subscription requires cooperative user type (403 for others). (3) /choose-plan validates plan parameter. (4) Frontend PricingSection has data-testid attributes for all elements. (5) FAQ page has REDD+ and Abonnements categories with relevant questions. (6) CTA section updated with 6-month trial and REDD+ messaging.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent
